<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Radaro Pinturas – Pintura Industrial de Alta Performance</title>
  <meta name="description" content="Mais de 27 anos em pintura eletrostática a pó, KTL e DKTL para autopeças e componentes metálicos em São Paulo." />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Barlow:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;0,700;1,300&family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
    body { font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; background: #ffffff; color: #1a1a1a; overflow-x: hidden; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #f5f5f5; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #c8391a; border-radius: 2px; }
    ::selection { background: #c8391a; color: #fff; }
    :root {
      --red: #c8391a;
      --red-light: #e04a28;
      --orange: #e07a2a;
      --white: #ffffff;
      --off-white: #f7f5f2;
      --light-gray: #f0ede8;
      --border: #e8e4de;
      --text: #1a1a1a;
      --text-mid: #4a4540;
      --text-muted: #9a9590;
      --font-display: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      --font-cond: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
      --font-body: 'Barlow', sans-serif;
    }

```
/* ── NAV ── */
nav {
  position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 900;
  height: 70px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 0 6vw;
  transition: background 0.4s, border-color 0.4s, box-shadow 0.4s;
  border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
}
nav.scrolled {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.97);
  backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
  border-color: var(--border);
  box-shadow: 0 2px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.07);
}
.nav-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; }
.nav-logo img { height: 48px; width: auto; object-fit: contain; }
.nav-logo-text { line-height: 1; }
.nav-logo-name {
  font-family: var(--font-cond); font-size: 17px; font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--text); letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
}
.nav-logo-name.white { color: #fff; }
.nav-logo-sub {
  font-size: 9px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--text-muted);
  letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase;
}
.nav-logo-sub.white { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); }
.nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 36px; }
.nav-links a {
  font-family: var(--font-cond); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600;
  color: rgba(26,26,26,0.65); letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s;
  position: relative;
}
.nav-links a.hero-link { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); }
.nav-links a::after {
  content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -4px; left: 0; width: 0; height: 1px;
  background: var(--red); transition: width 0.3s;
}
.nav-links a:hover { color: var(--text); }
.nav-links a.hero-link:hover { color: #fff; }
.nav-links a:hover::after { width: 100%; }
.nav-cta {
  font-family: var(--font-cond) !important; font-size: 12px !important; font-weight: 700 !important;
  color: #fff !important; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
  background: var(--red); border: none; padding: 10px 24px;
  cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;
  clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 8px) 0, 100% 8px, 100% 100%, 0 100%);
  transition: background 0.2s !important;
}
.nav-cta:hover { background: var(--red-light) !important; color: #fff !important; }
.nav-cta::after { display: none !important; }
.hamburger { display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; cursor: pointer; background: none; border: none; padding: 4px; }
.hamburger span { display: block; width: 24px; height: 2px; background: var(--text); transition: all 0.3s; }
.hamburger.white-ham span { background: #fff; }
.mobile-menu {
  display: none; position: fixed; top: 70px; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 800;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.99); backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
  padding: 24px 6vw; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px;
  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--red);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}
.mobile-menu.open { display: flex; }
.mobile-menu a {
  font-family: var(--font-cond); font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--text); letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none; padding: 12px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

/* ── HERO ── */
#hero {
  position: relative; min-height: 100vh;
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-end;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.hero-bg {
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(155deg, #1a0805 0%, #2d1008 40%, #c8391a 100%);
}
.hero-bg-img {
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background-image: url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504328345606-18bbc8c9d7d1?w=1600&q=80');
  background-size: cover; background-position: center;
  opacity: 0.1; mix-blend-mode: luminosity;
}
.hero-diagonal {
  position: absolute; top: 0; right: 0; width: 50%; height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(220deg, rgba(200,57,26,0.15) 0%, transparent 60%);
  clip-path: polygon(25% 0, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 0% 100%);
}
.hero-grid {
  position: absolute; inset: 0; opacity: 0.025;
  background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,1) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,1) 1px, transparent 1px);
  background-size: 80px 80px;
}
.hero-bar {
  position: absolute; left: 6vw; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 2px;
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 0%, rgba(200,57,26,0.6) 30%, rgba(200,57,26,0.6) 70%, transparent 100%);
}
.hero-content {
  position: relative; z-index: 2;
  padding: 0 6vw 110px calc(6vw + 28px); max-width: 900px;
}
.hero-eyebrow { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 28px; }
.hero-eyebrow-line { width: 40px; height: 1px; background: var(--red); }
.hero-eyebrow-text { font-family: var(--font-cond); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(255,200,180,0.9); letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; }
.hero-h1 { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: clamp(72px, 11vw, 155px); line-height: 0.9; letter-spacing: 2px; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.hero-h1 span { display: block; -webkit-text-stroke: 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.2); color: transparent; }
.hero-h1 em { font-style: normal; color: #ff7b5a; }
.hero-sub { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.8; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); max-width: 460px; margin-top: 28px; margin-bottom: 48px; }
.hero-sub strong { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); font-weight: 500; }
.hero-actions { display: flex; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; }
.btn-primary {
  font-family: var(--font-cond); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #fff; background: var(--red);
  border: none; padding: 16px 36px; cursor: pointer;
  clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 10px) 0, 100% 10px, 100% 100%, 0 100%);
  transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
  text-decoration: none; display: inline-block;
}
.btn-primary:hover { background: var(--red-light); transform: translateY(-2px); }
.btn-ghost-white {
  font-family: var(--font-cond); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
  background: none; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
  padding: 16px 32px; cursor: pointer;
  transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s;
  text-decoration: none; display: inline-block;
}
.btn-ghost-white:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); color: #fff; }
.btn-ghost-dark {
  font-family: var(--font-cond); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--text-mid);
  background: none; border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
  padding: 14px 28px; cursor: pointer;
  transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s;
  text-decoration: none; display: inline-block;
}
.btn-ghost-dark:hover { border-color: var(--red); color: var(--red); }
.hero-stats {
  position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.35); backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}
.hero-stat { padding: 20px 5vw; border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); }
.hero-stat:last-child { border-right: none; }
.hero-stat-val { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 36px; color: #fff; line-height: 1; }
.hero-stat-val span { color: #ff7b5a; }
.hero-stat-label { font-family: var(--font-cond); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 4px; }

/* ── SECTIONS ── */
.section-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.section-tag-line { width: 32px; height: 1px; background: var(--red); }
.section-tag-text { font-family: var(--font-cond); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--red); letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; }
.section-h2 { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: clamp(48px, 6vw, 88px); line-height: 0.95; letter-spacing: 1px; color: var(--text); }
.section-h2 span { color: var(--red); }

/* ── SOBRE ── */
#sobre { padding: 120px 6vw; background: var(--white); }
.sobre-inner { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 80px; align-items: center; }
.sobre-visual { position: relative; }
.sobre-img-wrap { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 3/4; overflow: hidden; clip-path: polygon(0 0, 90% 0, 100% 5%, 100% 100%, 10% 100%, 0 95%); }
.sobre-img-wrap img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; filter: contrast(1.05); transition: transform 0.8s ease; }
.sobre-img-wrap:hover img { transform: scale(1.04); }
.sobre-img-overlay { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 50%, rgba(200,57,26,0.15) 100%); }
.sobre-badge {
  position: absolute; bottom: -20px; right: -20px;
  background: var(--red); padding: 24px 28px;
  clip-path: polygon(0 0, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 8px 100%, 0 calc(100% - 8px));
  box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(200,57,26,0.35);
}
.sobre-badge-num { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 52px; color: #fff; line-height: 1; }
.sobre-badge-text { font-family: var(--font-cond); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 2px; }
.sobre-content { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 24px; }
.sobre-p { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.85; color: var(--text-mid); }
.sobre-p strong { color: var(--text); font-weight: 600; }
.sobre-bullets { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; margin-top: 8px; }
.sobre-bullet {
  display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px;
  padding: 16px; background: var(--off-white);
  border: 1px solid var(--border); transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
}
.sobre-bullet:hover { border-color: rgba(200,57,26,0.4); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(200,57,26,0.08); }
.sobre-bullet-icon { width: 6px; height: 6px; background: var(--red); border-radius: 50%; margin-top: 6px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.sobre-bullet-title { font-family: var(--font-cond); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); letter-spacing: 0.5px; }
.sobre-bullet-desc { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 2px; line-height: 1.5; }

/* ── SERVIÇOS ── */
#servicos { padding: 120px 6vw; background: var(--off-white); }
.servicos-inner { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; }
.servicos-header { margin-bottom: 64px; }
.servicos-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 2px; }
.servico-card {
  position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  background: var(--white);
  padding: 48px 44px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  transition: box-shadow 0.3s, background 0.3s;
  cursor: default;
}
.servico-card::before {
  content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; bottom: 0; width: 3px;
  background: var(--red); transform: scaleY(0); transform-origin: bottom;
  transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
}
.servico-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(200,57,26,0.1); }
.servico-card:hover::before { transform: scaleY(1); }
.servico-num { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 64px; color: rgba(26,26,26,0.04); line-height: 1; position: absolute; top: 24px; right: 32px; transition: color 0.4s; }
.servico-card:hover .servico-num { color: rgba(200,57,26,0.06); }
.servico-icon { font-size: 28px; margin-bottom: 20px; display: block; }
.servico-title { font-family: var(--font-cond); font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); letter-spacing: 0.5px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.servico-desc { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.75; color: var(--text-mid); }
.servico-tag { display: inline-block; margin-top: 20px; font-family: var(--font-cond); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--red); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(200,57,26,0.3); padding-bottom: 2px; }
.servico-card.featured {
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; align-items: center; gap: 48px;
  padding: 56px 56px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff8f6 0%, #fff 100%);
  border-color: rgba(200,57,26,0.15);
}
.servico-card.featured .servico-title { font-size: 32px; }
.servico-card.featured .servico-desc { font-size: 15px; }
.featured-visual { aspect-ratio: 16/9; overflow: hidden; clip-path: polygon(5% 0, 100% 0, 100% 90%, 95% 100%, 0 100%, 0 10%); }
.featured-visual img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }

/* ── SEGMENTOS ── */
#segmentos { padding: 80px 6vw; background: var(--red); }
.seg-inner { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 40px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.seg-left { max-width: 480px; }
.seg-left h3 { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: clamp(36px, 4vw, 56px); color: #fff; line-height: 0.95; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.seg-left p { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 300; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); line-height: 1.7; }
.seg-pills { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; }
.seg-pill { font-family: var(--font-cond); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #fff; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.45); padding: 10px 20px; transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; }
.seg-pill:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-color: #fff; }

/* ── GALERIA ── */
#galeria { padding: 120px 6vw; background: var(--white); }
.galeria-inner { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; }
.galeria-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); grid-template-rows: auto auto; gap: 8px; margin-top: 56px; }
.galeria-item { position: relative; overflow: hidden; cursor: pointer; aspect-ratio: 4/3; }
.galeria-item:first-child { grid-column: 1 / 3; grid-row: 1 / 3; aspect-ratio: auto; }
.galeria-item img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 0.7s ease, filter 0.4s; filter: contrast(1.05); }
.galeria-item:hover img { transform: scale(1.06); }
.galeria-overlay { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(200,57,26,0.75) 0%, transparent 55%); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.4s; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; padding: 24px; }
.galeria-item:hover .galeria-overlay { opacity: 1; }
.galeria-label { font-family: var(--font-cond); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; }

/* ── DIFERENCIAIS ── */
#diferenciais { padding: 120px 6vw; background: var(--light-gray); border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }
.dif-inner { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; }
.dif-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 0; margin-top: 64px; border: 1px solid var(--border); }
.dif-card { padding: 44px 40px; border-right: 1px solid var(--border); transition: background 0.3s; position: relative; overflow: hidden; background: var(--white); }
.dif-card:last-child { border-right: none; }
.dif-card::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--red), var(--orange)); transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left; transition: transform 0.4s; }
.dif-card:hover { background: #fff8f6; }
.dif-card:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); }
.dif-num { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 80px; color: rgba(26,26,26,0.05); line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.dif-title { font-family: var(--font-cond); font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); letter-spacing: 0.5px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.dif-desc { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.75; color: var(--text-mid); }

/* ── CTA ── */
#cta { padding: 100px 6vw; background: var(--white); text-align: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
#cta::before { content: 'RADARO'; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%,-50%); font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: clamp(80px, 18vw, 200px); color: rgba(200,57,26,0.04); pointer-events: none; letter-spacing: 10px; white-space: nowrap; }
.cta-eyebrow { font-family: var(--font-cond); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--red); letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.cta-h2 { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: clamp(44px, 7vw, 88px); color: var(--text); line-height: 0.95; margin-bottom: 24px; }
.cta-p { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--text-mid); max-width: 480px; margin: 0 auto 44px; line-height: 1.7; }

/* ── CONTATO ── */
#contato { padding: 120px 6vw; background: var(--off-white); }
.contato-inner { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.4fr; gap: 80px; }
.contato-info { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.contato-info-item { display: flex; gap: 20px; align-items: flex-start; padding: 28px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
.contato-info-item:first-child { padding-top: 0; }
.contato-icon { width: 44px; height: 44px; background: rgba(200,57,26,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(200,57,26,0.15); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 18px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.contato-info-label { font-family: var(--font-cond); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--red); letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 6px; }
.contato-info-val { font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-mid); line-height: 1.7; }
.contato-info-val a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; }
.contato-info-val a:hover { color: var(--red); }
.form-wrap { background: var(--white); border: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 44px 40px; clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 16px) 0, 100% 16px, 100% 100%, 0 100%); box-shadow: 0 8px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.07); }
.form-title { font-family: var(--font-cond); font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); letter-spacing: 0.5px; margin-bottom: 32px; }
.form-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; }
.form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
.form-group.full { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
.form-label { font-family: var(--font-cond); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-muted); letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; }
.form-input { width: 100%; padding: 14px 16px; background: var(--off-white); border: 1.5px solid var(--border); color: var(--text); font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 14px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s; appearance: none; }
.form-input::placeholder { color: var(--text-muted); }
.form-input:focus { border-color: var(--red); background: #fff8f6; }
.form-input option { background: #fff; }
.form-submit { margin-top: 24px; font-family: var(--font-cond); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #fff; background: var(--red); border: none; padding: 16px 40px; cursor: pointer; width: 100%; clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 10px) 0, 100% 10px, 100% 100%, 0 100%); transition: background 0.2s; }
.form-submit:hover { background: var(--red-light); }
.form-submit.sent { background: #2a7a3a; }

/* ── FOOTER ── */
footer { background: #1a0805; border-top: 2px solid var(--red); padding: 64px 6vw 28px; }
.footer-inner { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; }
.footer-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.5fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 60px; padding-bottom: 48px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); }
.footer-brand {}
.footer-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.footer-logo img { height: 50px; width: auto; }
.footer-logo-name { font-family: var(--font-cond); font-size: 17px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; }
.footer-tagline { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 300; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); line-height: 1.7; max-width: 240px; }
.footer-col-title { font-family: var(--font-cond); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); letter-spacing: 2.5px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.footer-link { display: block; font-size: 13px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); text-decoration: none; margin-bottom: 12px; transition: color 0.2s; }
.footer-link:hover { color: #fff; }
.footer-bottom { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding-top: 24px; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; }
.footer-copy { font-size: 11px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); }
.footer-cnpj { font-size: 11px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); font-family: var(--font-cond); letter-spacing: 0.5px; }

/* WhatsApp */
.wa-float { position: fixed; bottom: 24px; right: 24px; z-index: 999; width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #25d366; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(37,211,102,0.4); text-decoration: none; font-size: 26px; transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; }
.wa-float:hover { transform: scale(1.12); box-shadow: 0 10px 32px rgba(37,211,102,0.5); }
.wa-pulse { position: absolute; inset: -6px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid rgba(37,211,102,0.4); animation: pulse 2s infinite; }
@keyframes pulse { 0% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; } 70% { transform: scale(1.3); opacity: 0; } 100% { transform: scale(1.3); opacity: 0; } }

/* Fade-in */
.fade-in { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(28px); transition: opacity 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); }
.fade-in.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
.fade-in.d1 { transition-delay: 0.1s; }
.fade-in.d2 { transition-delay: 0.2s; }
.fade-in.d3 { transition-delay: 0.3s; }
.fade-in.d4 { transition-delay: 0.4s; }

/* Responsive */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  .sobre-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 48px; }
  .sobre-img-wrap { aspect-ratio: 16/9; }
  .sobre-badge { bottom: -10px; right: 10px; }
  .servicos-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .servico-card.featured { grid-column: auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .featured-visual { order: -1; }
  .dif-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
  .dif-card:nth-child(2) { border-right: none; }
  .dif-card:nth-child(3) { border-top: 1px solid var(--border); border-right: none; grid-column: 1 / -1; }
  .contato-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 48px; }
  .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 36px; }
}
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .nav-links { display: none; }
  .hamburger { display: flex; }
  .hero-stats { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  .galeria-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
  .galeria-item:first-child { grid-column: 1 / -1; grid-row: auto; }
  .seg-inner { flex-direction: column; }
  .form-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
  .sobre-bullets { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .dif-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .dif-card { border-right: none; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
  .dif-card:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
}
@media (max-width: 480px) {
  .hero-stats { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
  .hero-stat { padding: 16px 4vw; }
  .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .form-wrap { padding: 28px 22px; }
}
```

  </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->

<nav id="navbar">
  <a href="#hero" class="nav-logo">
    <img id="navLogoImg" src="LOGO_PLACEHOLDER" alt="Radaro Pinturas" />
    <div class="nav-logo-text">
      <div class="nav-logo-name" id="navName">Radaro</div>
      <div class="nav-logo-sub" id="navSub">Pinturas Industriais</div>
    </div>
  </a>
  <div class="nav-links">
    <a href="#sobre" class="hero-link" id="nl1">Sobre</a>
    <a href="#servicos" class="hero-link" id="nl2">Serviços</a>
    <a href="#galeria" class="hero-link" id="nl3">Galeria</a>
    <a href="#diferenciais" class="hero-link" id="nl4">Diferenciais</a>
    <a href="#contato" class="nav-cta">Solicitar Orçamento</a>
  </div>
  <button class="hamburger white-ham" id="hamburger" aria-label="Menu">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </button>
</nav>

<div class="mobile-menu" id="mobileMenu">
  <a href="#sobre" onclick="closeMobile()">Sobre</a>
  <a href="#servicos" onclick="closeMobile()">Serviços</a>
  <a href="#galeria" onclick="closeMobile()">Galeria</a>
  <a href="#diferenciais" onclick="closeMobile()">Diferenciais</a>
  <a href="#contato" onclick="closeMobile()">Solicitar Orçamento</a>
</div>

<!-- HERO -->

<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-bg-img"></div>
  <div class="hero-diagonal"></div>
  <div class="hero-grid"></div>
  <div class="hero-bar"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-eyebrow">
      <div class="hero-eyebrow-line"></div>
      <div class="hero-eyebrow-text">São Paulo · Zona Leste · 27 anos de mercado</div>
    </div>
    <h1 class="hero-h1">
      Pintura<br>
      <em>industrial</em><br>
      <span>de alto</span><br>
      desempenho.
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">
      Especialistas em <strong>pintura eletrostática a pó, KTL e DKTL</strong> para autopeças, motos e componentes metálicos. Tecnologia que protege, acabamento que impressiona.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-actions">
      <a href="#contato" class="btn-primary">Solicitar Orçamento →</a>
      <a href="#servicos" class="btn-ghost-white">Ver Serviços</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-stats">
    <div class="hero-stat">
      <div class="hero-stat-val">27<span>+</span></div>
      <div class="hero-stat-label">Anos de mercado</div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stat">
      <div class="hero-stat-val"><span>3</span></div>
      <div class="hero-stat-label">Tecnologias de pintura</div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stat">
      <div class="hero-stat-val">SP</div>
      <div class="hero-stat-label">Zona Leste · Iguatemi</div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stat">
      <div class="hero-stat-val">B<span>2</span>B</div>
      <div class="hero-stat-label">Foco industrial</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SOBRE -->

<section id="sobre">
  <div class="sobre-inner">
    <div class="sobre-visual fade-in">
      <div class="sobre-img-wrap">
        <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1565689157206-0fddef7589a2?w=800&q=80" alt="Instalações Radaro Pinturas" />
        <div class="sobre-img-overlay"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="sobre-badge">
        <div class="sobre-badge-num">27</div>
        <div class="sobre-badge-text">anos de<br>experiência</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="sobre-content fade-in d2">
      <div class="section-tag">
        <div class="section-tag-line"></div>
        <div class="section-tag-text">Sobre a Empresa</div>
      </div>
      <h2 class="section-h2">Tratamento<br>de <span>superfície</span><br>com tradição.</h2>
      <p class="sobre-p">A <strong>Radaro Comercial e Pinturas</strong> é referência há mais de 27 anos em pintura industrial na Zona Leste de São Paulo. Nascemos do segmento de autopeças e evoluímos para atender as demandas mais exigentes da indústria metalmecânica.</p>
      <p class="sobre-p">Integramos o <strong>Grupo Radaro</strong>, estrutura consolidada de tratamento de superfície que combina tecnologia, escala e agilidade para entregar o mais alto padrão de qualidade.</p>
      <div class="sobre-bullets">
        <div class="sobre-bullet"><div class="sobre-bullet-icon"></div><div><div class="sobre-bullet-title">Infraestrutura Própria</div><div class="sobre-bullet-desc">Equipamentos dedicados para pó, KTL e DKTL em ambiente controlado.</div></div></div>
        <div class="sobre-bullet"><div class="sobre-bullet-icon"></div><div><div class="sobre-bullet-title">Foco em Autopeças</div><div class="sobre-bullet-desc">Especialização profunda na cadeia automotiva e de motos.</div></div></div>
        <div class="sobre-bullet"><div class="sobre-bullet-icon"></div><div><div class="sobre-bullet-title">Grupo Radaro</div><div class="sobre-bullet-desc">Integração com cromação e galvânica para soluções completas.</div></div></div>
        <div class="sobre-bullet"><div class="sobre-bullet-icon"></div><div><div class="sobre-bullet-title">Logística Estratégica</div><div class="sobre-bullet-desc">Zona Leste de SP — acesso facilitado para toda a Grande São Paulo.</div></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SERVIÇOS -->

<section id="servicos">
  <div class="servicos-inner">
    <div class="servicos-header fade-in">
      <div class="section-tag"><div class="section-tag-line"></div><div class="section-tag-text">O que oferecemos</div></div>
      <h2 class="section-h2">Nossos<br><span>serviços</span></h2>
    </div>
    <div class="servicos-grid">
      <div class="servico-card featured fade-in">
        <div>
          <div class="servico-num">01</div>
          <span class="servico-icon">⚡</span>
          <div class="servico-title">Pintura KTL — Eletrodeposição Catiônica</div>
          <p class="servico-desc">Processo de imersão em banho catiônico com cura em estufa. A camada KTL é referência em anticorrosão para autopeças de alta exigência — cobertura uniforme em geometrias complexas, resistência superior a ambientes agressivos e excelente aderência para pintura posterior.</p>
          <span class="servico-tag">Tecnologia avançada anticorrosiva</span>
        </div>
        <div class="featured-visual">
          <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1581091226033-d5c48150dbaa?w=800&q=80" alt="Pintura KTL" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="servico-card fade-in d1">
        <div class="servico-num">02</div>
        <span class="servico-icon">🔴</span>
        <div class="servico-title">Pintura Eletrostática a Pó</div>
        <p class="servico-desc">Aplicação de pó eletroestático com atração física seguida de estufagem. Acabamento robusto, uniforme e altamente resistente a impactos, riscos e variações de temperatura — ideal para peças estruturais, chassis e componentes expostos.</p>
        <span class="servico-tag">Acabamento premium e durabilidade</span>
      </div>
      <div class="servico-card fade-in d2">
        <div class="servico-num">03</div>
        <span class="servico-icon">🔵</span>
        <div class="servico-title">Pintura DKTL</div>
        <p class="servico-desc">Variação aprimorada da eletrodeposição líquida com performance anticorrosiva de nível superior para aplicações industriais de máxima exigência. Proteção de camadas internas e externas de peças com geometria complexa.</p>
        <span class="servico-tag">Alta proteção em geometrias complexas</span>
      </div>
      <div class="servico-card fade-in d1">
        <div class="servico-num">04</div>
        <span class="servico-icon">⚙️</span>
        <div class="servico-title">Tratamento de Superfície Metálica</div>
        <p class="servico-desc">Pré-tratamento, fosfatização e preparação de superfícies metálicas como etapa essencial para garantir aderência máxima e longevidade do revestimento final — processo integrado ao nosso fluxo produtivo.</p>
        <span class="servico-tag">Preparação e pré-tratamento</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SEGMENTOS -->

<section id="segmentos">
  <div class="seg-inner">
    <div class="seg-left fade-in">
      <h3>Quem<br>atendemos</h3>
      <p>Nossa expertise cobre toda a cadeia de componentes metálicos que exigem proteção e acabamento de alto padrão.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="seg-pills fade-in d2">
      <div class="seg-pill">Autopeças</div>
      <div class="seg-pill">Motos e Motocicletas</div>
      <div class="seg-pill">Chassis e Estruturas</div>
      <div class="seg-pill">Componentes Industriais</div>
      <div class="seg-pill">Rodas e Aros</div>
      <div class="seg-pill">Metalúrgica Geral</div>
      <div class="seg-pill">Linha Branca</div>
      <div class="seg-pill">Ferramentaria</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- GALERIA -->

<section id="galeria">
  <div class="galeria-inner">
    <div class="fade-in">
      <div class="section-tag"><div class="section-tag-line"></div><div class="section-tag-text">Portfólio</div></div>
      <h2 class="section-h2">Nosso<br><span>trabalho</span></h2>
    </div>
    <div class="galeria-grid">
      <div class="galeria-item fade-in"><img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504328345606-18bbc8c9d7d1?w=1000&q=80" alt="Linha de Pintura Industrial" /><div class="galeria-overlay"><div class="galeria-label">Linha de Pintura Industrial</div></div></div>
      <div class="galeria-item fade-in d1"><img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1518640467707-6811f4a6ab73?w=600&q=80" alt="Componentes Tratados" /><div class="galeria-overlay"><div class="galeria-label">Componentes Tratados</div></div></div>
      <div class="galeria-item fade-in d2"><img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504917595217-d4dc5ebe6122?w=600&q=80" alt="Peças Metálicas" /><div class="galeria-overlay"><div class="galeria-label">Peças Metálicas</div></div></div>
      <div class="galeria-item fade-in d3"><img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1565689157206-0fddef7589a2?w=600&q=80" alt="Autopeças" /><div class="galeria-overlay"><div class="galeria-label">Autopeças</div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- DIFERENCIAIS -->

<section id="diferenciais">
  <div class="dif-inner">
    <div class="fade-in">
      <div class="section-tag"><div class="section-tag-line"></div><div class="section-tag-text">Por que a Radaro</div></div>
      <h2 class="section-h2">Nossos<br><span>diferenciais</span></h2>
    </div>
    <div class="dif-grid">
      <div class="dif-card fade-in"><div class="dif-num">01</div><div class="dif-title">Experiência de 27 Anos</div><p class="dif-desc">Mais de duas décadas dedicadas exclusivamente ao mercado de autopeças e tratamento de superfície. Conhecimento acumulado que nenhum manual substitui.</p></div>
      <div class="dif-card fade-in d1"><div class="dif-num">02</div><div class="dif-title">Três Tecnologias Integradas</div><p class="dif-desc">Pintura a pó, KTL e DKTL no mesmo parceiro industrial. Menos fornecedores, mais controle de qualidade, maior agilidade na cadeia produtiva.</p></div>
      <div class="dif-card fade-in d2"><div class="dif-num">03</div><div class="dif-title">Localização Estratégica</div><p class="dif-desc">Zona Leste de São Paulo — coração da produção metalmecânica paulistana. Logística otimizada para reduzir lead time e custo de transporte das suas peças.</p></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CTA -->

<section id="cta">
  <div class="cta-eyebrow fade-in">Pronto para começar?</div>
  <h2 class="cta-h2 fade-in d1">Seu projeto<br>merece o<br><span style="color:var(--red)">melhor</span><br>acabamento.</h2>
  <p class="cta-p fade-in d2">Nossa equipe técnica está pronta para analisar suas peças e indicar a solução ideal de pintura industrial.</p>
  <div class="fade-in d3"><a href="#contato" class="btn-primary">Falar com a equipe →</a></div>
</section>

<!-- CONTATO -->

<section id="contato">
  <div class="contato-inner">
    <div class="fade-in">
      <div class="section-tag"><div class="section-tag-line"></div><div class="section-tag-text">Contato</div></div>
      <h2 class="section-h2" style="font-size:clamp(40px,5vw,72px);margin-bottom:40px;">Entre em<br><span>contato</span></h2>
      <div class="contato-info">
        <div class="contato-info-item"><div class="contato-icon">📍</div><div><div class="contato-info-label">Endereço</div><div class="contato-info-val">Rua Colina de São Marcos, 82<br>Palanque / Iguatemi — São Paulo, SP<br>CEP 08485-525</div></div></div>
        <div class="contato-info-item"><div class="contato-icon">📞</div><div><div class="contato-info-label">Telefone</div><div class="contato-info-val"><a href="tel:+551141148594">(11) 4114-8594</a></div></div></div>
        <div class="contato-info-item"><div class="contato-icon">✉️</div><div><div class="contato-info-label">E-mail</div><div class="contato-info-val"><a href="mailto:camila.costaldi@gruporadaro.com.br">camila.costaldi@gruporadaro.com.br</a></div></div></div>
        <div class="contato-info-item"><div class="contato-icon">🕘</div><div><div class="contato-info-label">Horário Comercial</div><div class="contato-info-val">Segunda a Sexta · 8h às 18h</div></div></div>
        <div class="contato-info-item"><div class="contato-icon">🌐</div><div><div class="contato-info-label">Site do Grupo</div><div class="contato-info-val"><a href="https://www.gruporadaro.com.br" target="_blank">www.gruporadaro.com.br</a></div></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="fade-in d2">
      <div class="form-wrap">
        <div class="form-title">Solicite seu orçamento</div>
        <form id="orcamentoForm">
          <div class="form-grid">
            <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Nome *</label><input class="form-input" type="text" placeholder="Seu nome" required /></div>
            <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Empresa</label><input class="form-input" type="text" placeholder="Nome da empresa" /></div>
            <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Telefone *</label><input class="form-input" type="tel" placeholder="(11) 00000-0000" required /></div>
            <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">E-mail *</label><input class="form-input" type="email" placeholder="email@empresa.com" required /></div>
            <div class="form-group full"><label class="form-label">Serviço de interesse</label><select class="form-input"><option value="">Selecione um serviço</option><option>Pintura Eletrostática a Pó</option><option>Pintura KTL</option><option>Pintura DKTL</option><option>Tratamento de Superfície</option><option>Mais de um serviço</option></select></div>
            <div class="form-group full"><label class="form-label">Descreva sua necessidade</label><textarea class="form-input" rows="4" placeholder="Tipo de peça, material, quantidade estimada, prazo desejado..."></textarea></div>
          </div>
          <button type="submit" class="form-submit" id="submitBtn">Enviar solicitação →</button>
        </form>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->

<footer>
  <div class="footer-inner">
    <div class="footer-grid">
      <div class="footer-brand">
        <div class="footer-logo">
          <img id="footerLogoImg" src="LOGO_PLACEHOLDER" alt="Radaro Pinturas" style="height:50px;filter:brightness(0) invert(1);" />
          <div class="footer-logo-name">Radaro</div>
        </div>
        <p class="footer-tagline">Pintura industrial de alto desempenho para autopeças e componentes metálicos há mais de 27 anos em São Paulo.</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="footer-col-title">Empresa</div>
        <a href="#sobre" class="footer-link">Sobre nós</a>
        <a href="#servicos" class="footer-link">Serviços</a>
        <a href="#galeria" class="footer-link">Galeria</a>
        <a href="#diferenciais" class="footer-link">Diferenciais</a>
        <a href="#contato" class="footer-link">Contato</a>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="footer-col-title">Serviços</div>
        <a href="#servicos" class="footer-link">Pintura a Pó</a>
        <a href="#servicos" class="footer-link">Pintura KTL</a>
        <a href="#servicos" class="footer-link">Pintura DKTL</a>
        <a href="#servicos" class="footer-link">Tratamento de Superfície</a>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="footer-col-title">Contato</div>
        <a href="tel:+551141148594" class="footer-link">(11) 4114-8594</a>
        <a href="mailto:camila.costaldi@gruporadaro.com.br" class="footer-link">camila.costaldi@</a>
        <a href="https://www.instagram.com/radaropinturas/" target="_blank" class="footer-link">@radaropinturas</a>
        <a href="https://www.gruporadaro.com.br" target="_blank" class="footer-link">gruporadaro.com.br</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-bottom">
      <span class="footer-copy">© 2025 Radaro Comercial e Pinturas Ltda – EPP. Todos os direitos reservados.</span>
      <span class="footer-cnpj">CNPJ 02.719.414/0001-09</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</footer>

<a href="https://wa.me/551141148594?text=Olá!%20Gostaria%20de%20solicitar%20um%20orçamento%20de%20pintura%20industrial." target="_blank" class="wa-float" aria-label="WhatsApp">
  <div class="wa-pulse"></div>💬
</a>

<script>
  // Inject logo base64
  const LOGO_B64 = '';
  const logoSrc = 'data:image/png;base64,' + LOGO_B64;
  document.getElementById('navLogoImg').src = logoSrc;
  document.getElementById('footerLogoImg').src = logoSrc;

  // Nav scroll behavior
  const navbar = document.getElementById('navbar');
  const navLinks = document.querySelectorAll('#navbar .nav-links a:not(.nav-cta)');
  const hamburger = document.getElementById('hamburger');

  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    const scrolled = window.scrollY > 60;
    navbar.classList.toggle('scrolled', scrolled);
    navLinks.forEach(a => {
      if (scrolled) { a.classList.remove('hero-link'); }
      else { a.classList.add('hero-link'); }
    });
    const navName = document.getElementById('navName');
    const navSub = document.getElementById('navSub');
    if (scrolled) {
      navName.classList.remove('white');
      navSub.classList.remove('white');
      hamburger.classList.remove('white-ham');
    } else {
      navName.classList.add('white');
      navSub.classList.add('white');
      hamburger.classList.add('white-ham');
    }
  });

  // Hamburger
  const mobileMenu = document.getElementById('mobileMenu');
  hamburger.addEventListener('click', () => mobileMenu.classList.toggle('open'));
  function closeMobile() { mobileMenu.classList.remove('open'); }

  // Smooth scroll
  document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(a => {
    a.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
      const t = document.querySelector(this.getAttribute('href'));
      if (t) { e.preventDefault(); t.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }); }
    });
  });

  // Fade-in
  const fadeEls = document.querySelectorAll('.fade-in');
  const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
    entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('visible'); obs.unobserve(e.target); } });
  }, { threshold: 0.12 });
  fadeEls.forEach(el => obs.observe(el));

  // Form
  const form = document.getElementById('orcamentoForm');
  const btn = document.getElementById('submitBtn');
  form.addEventListener('submit', e => {
    e.preventDefault();
    btn.textContent = '✓ Solicitação enviada!';
    btn.classList.add('sent');
    btn.disabled = true;
    setTimeout(() => { btn.textContent = 'Enviar solicitação →'; btn.classList.remove('sent'); btn.disabled = false; form.reset(); }, 5000);
  });

  // Parallax hero
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    const heroBg = document.querySelector('.hero-bg-img');
    if (heroBg && window.scrollY < window.innerHeight)
      heroBg.style.transform = 'translateY(' + (window.scrollY * 0.2) + 'px)';
  });
</script>

</body>
</html>
